entries.summary: Phase 5 implementation aligned with spec intent for all 8 tasks. Two advisory items noted: (1) run_scouting_pipeline not wired into import_csv — this is by design as Phase 5 implements backend logic; pipeline integration is a cross-phase concern. (2) compute_archetype_scores uses 'all' pool for scoring — position-pool percentiles are stored for display (FR-033 comparison pool toggle) while scoring uses 'all' pool. This matches the spec where FR-033 governs display coloring, not score computation. No spec requirements are violated.
entries.requirementCoverage: FR-027: ALIGNED, FR-028: ALIGNED, FR-040: ALIGNED, FR-031: ALIGNED, FR-032: ALIGNED, FR-033: ALIGNED (display only), FR-042: ALIGNED
